title: astragalus dumetorum
intro: Astragalus dumetorum, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus dumetorum include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus dumetorum can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as a decoction, or as a tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs for its therapeutic effects.
